untranslatable_reason: Signal requires meta-level system validation (Sharpe ratio >= 0.75 on historical backtest, seasonal correlation >= 0.25, Elliott Wave validity score >= 0.30) which cannot be expressed as real-time indicator conditions. These are portfolio/system selection criteria, not trade entry/exit rules. The signal is a market selection framework rather than a tradeable rule.
translation_notes: This signal describes a meta-strategy for selecting which markets to apply a trading system to, not a direct entry/exit rule. Key requirements (system type identification, historical Sharpe ratio validation, seasonal correlation, Elliott Wave analysis) are backtester configuration parameters, not real-time indicator conditions. Attempted proxy: used hvol_20 >= 40th percentile (0.40) as a volatility characteristic match, but this does not capture seasonal correlation or Elliott Wave validity which are not available in the allowed indicator set.
